seo.title: Dim Sum Menu 点心菜单 — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
seo.description: Over 80 hand-crafted dim sum varieties daily from 10am to 3pm. Steamed, baked, fried, and dessert selections with full Chinese menu names.

hero.heading: Dim Sum 点心
hero.subheadingZh: 逾80种精心点心 · 每日上午10时至下午3时

cartConfig.confirmationMessage: Your dim sum basket has been received. We will confirm your pre-order by phone within 2 hours.
cartConfig.confirmationMessageZh: 您的点心预订已收到。我们将在2小时内电话确认您的预订。

notes: Dim sum is freshly made to order. Some items may have limited daily quantities. Weekend brunch offers extended selection from 9:30am.
notesZh: 点心均为新鲜现点现做。部分菜品每日供应数量有限。周末早午餐从早9时30分起提供更多品种。
